findings.detail: Expected input under docs/catalog/heartbeats was absent in this checkout, so ZEUS could not compare against a current heartbeat artifact.
Live signals returned composite 0.691 with the same elevated anomalies observed in the prior ZEUS run: NASA EONET event load and DAEDALUS Self-ping HTTP 401.
integrity-status reported cycle C-278 with global_integrity 0.83 but source=mock, so GI is not verified even though kv=true.
The candidates endpoint returned zero items, so verification and publish steps were skipped.
POST /api/agents/journal succeeded and returned ok=true with duplicate=true for this cycle token.

recommendation: Restore live integrity sourcing before treating GI as authoritative, investigate the persistent DAEDALUS self-ping 401, and restore the expected ATLAS heartbeat artifact path for direct cross-checking.
